channel.title: strategy on Magistr and Maps
channel.description: Recent content in strategy on Magistr and Maps

item.title: Reading the board from the stands
item.description: Here are three compute strategies, and the thing I actually felt watching them. For the whole LLM circus I did not pay much attention to Nvidia.

item.title: Nvidia, Oxide, and tinygrad through a Wardley lens — the long version
item.description: Companion to “Reading the board from the stands”. The short essay is about what it did to me. This is the working-out: three value chains at three altitudes — the maps and my thoughts.
